sentiment: Every stroke moves forward — the hand trusts the line it cannot undo.

stories.title: Backtrack-Free Cursive
stories.summary: An exploration of cursive writing systems where the pen never backtracks — each stroke committed, flowing forward only.

stories.title: Zig Creator Calls Spade a Spade, Anthropic Blows Smoke
stories.summary: Honest critique cuts through the noise — naming things plainly when others obscure them.
